programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: The airline's customer service team face the challenge of getting passengers to Florida when the flight they are booked onto is oversold. S1Ep11

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: A daughter is embarrassed by her angry father, a grandmother is not allowed to travel with her oxygen canisters, and a delighted couple return home after adopting their baby daughter. S1Ep12

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: A bride-to-be is refused permission to fly for being too drunk, two Southwest pilots elope to Las Vegas to get married, and a bridal gown fails to make it home in one piece. S1Ep13

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: A blizzard threatens to ruin a newlywed couple's honeymoon, and a customer service supervisor tries to defuse a heated argument between two passengers at check-in. S1Ep14

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: A passenger faces the prospect of missing his son's operation after missing his flight, and an electrical failure causes a blackout onboard a grounded plane. S1Ep15

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: A couple of unusual passengers are causing excitement on a flight to Chicago's Sea World, and a man dressed as a tiger causes intrigue on the ground in Chicago. S1Ep16

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: There is frustration for the Airline staff as passengers turn up late and irate, and a passenger faces an anxious wait as she tries to get to her dying mother in time. S1Ep17

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: Two unaccompanied minors are close to boarding the wrong flight, and team members audition for the staff holiday cabaret - with the winners performing for passengers at the departure gates. S1Ep18

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: Staff have to handle a drunken passenger at 7am in the morning, stormy weather causes severe delays, and a supervisor has to inform a customer that he is too big for a plane seat. S1Ep1

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: Anita tells an angry family that they must buy an extra plane ticket for their toddler, and a passenger supervisor tries to calm a nervous flyer in Los Angeles. S1Ep2

programme.title: Killer Night Shift
programme.desc: (2018) Thriller with Ashleigh Dorrell. Amy begins her first night shift at a hotel. But this is a place with a dark past, and sometimes history repeats itself... Will she survive the graveyard shift?

programme.title: A Mother Betrayed
programme.desc: (2015) Tense drama with Lynn Collins. After a whirlwind wedding, a single mother finds herself committed to an institution when her husband plans to take everything she has - including her daughter.

programme.title: Ex-Wife Killer
programme.desc: A woman vouches for her ex-husband after he seemingly kills his new wife in self-defence but after he is let off the hook, she discovers his elaborate ploy. Starring Marguerite Moreau (2017)

programme.title: My Stepfather's Secret
programme.desc: (2019) Thriller with Vanessa Marcil. A college student returns home to discover her mother has a new fiancé. But as she finds out more about him, should it be alarm bells rather than wedding bells?

programme.title: Labor, Lies And Murder
programme.desc: (2022) Thriller with Brooke Burfitt. A pregnant woman hires a doula to help with her home birth. But as delivery day approaches and shocking secrets emerge, who can she really trust?

programme.title: Fatal Justice
programme.desc: (2012) Crime thriller with Cynthia Watros. After a robbery leaves her beloved niece in a coma and the cops have no leads, a woman goes from victim to vigilante and takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Fatal Flatline
programme.desc: (2020) Thriller starring Julie McNiven. A grieving couple donates their dead daughter's organs. But the recipient of her heart exhibits a disturbing and sinister obsession.

programme.title: Jack Hunter And The Lost Treasure Of Ugarit
programme.desc: An adventuring archaeologist navigates danger and conspiracy to try and find the fabled treasure of the Ugarit. Starring Ivan Sergei (2008).

programme.title: House of Darkness
programme.desc: (2002) Supernatural horror with Kate Bosworth and Justin Long. A man accompanies a mysterious woman to her secluded estate, but shadowy figures make it clear he isn't welcome.

programme.title: Bunraku
programme.desc: (2010) Martial arts action with Josh Hartnett and Woody Harrelson. A mysterious drifter, a bartender and a young samurai join up against a ruthless leader and deadly assassins.

programme.title: Four Fast Guns
programme.desc: (1960) Western with James Craig. A former gunslinger tries to restore order to a lawless town, but is foiled by the efforts of an evil saloon owner whose infirmity grants him immunity from violence.

programme.title: Panhandle
programme.desc: (1948) Western starring Rod Cameron. A former Texas marshal is determined to prove a powerful casino owner is behind his brother's murder.
